mapper.select:
SELECT mr.ROOM_SN, mr.ROOM_TYPE_CD,
case when mr.ROOM_TYPE_CD = '01' then ( select m.user_name || '님과의 대화' from MESSAGE_ROOM_PARTICIPANT mrp left join member m on mrp.PART_USER_ID = m.user_id where mrp.ROOM_SN = mr.ROOM_SN and mrp.PART_USER_ID != #{userId} ) else mr.ROOM_NM end as ROOM_NM,
mr.OPNR_USER_ID, mr.ROOM_CRET_DT, mr.LST_MSG_DT, mr.DEL_YN,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MESSAGE_ROOM_PARTICIPANT WHERE ROOM_SN = mr.ROOM_SN) AS PARTICIPANT_COUNT,
( select count(*) from message_content mc left join message_room_participant mrp on mc.ROOM_SN = mrp.ROOM_SN where mc.ROOM_SN = mr.ROOM_SN and mrp.PART_USER_ID = #{userId} and mc.MSG_SN > nvl(mrp.LST_READ_MSG_SN, 0) ) as UNREAD_MSG_COUNT,
(select mc.MSG_CN
from MESSAGE_CONTENT mc where mc.ROOM_SN = mr.ROOM_SN order by mc.SND_DT desc fetch first 1 row only ) as LST_MSG_CN
FROM MESSAGE_ROOM mr WHERE mr.ROOM_SN IN ( SELECT ROOM_SN FROM MESSAGE_ROOM_PARTICIPANT WHERE PART_USER_ID = #{userId} ) AND mr.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY mr.LST_MSG_DT DESC

SELECT mr.ROOM_SN, mr.ROOM_TYPE_CD,
case when mr.ROOM_TYPE_CD = '01' then ( select m.user_name || '님과의 대화' from MESSAGE_ROOM_PARTICIPANT mrp left join member m on mrp.PART_USER_ID = m.user_id where mrp.ROOM_SN = mr.ROOM_SN and mrp.PART_USER_ID != #{userId} ) else mr.ROOM_NM end as ROOM_NM,
mr.OPNR_USER_ID, mr.ROOM_CRET_DT, mr.LST_MSG_DT, mr.DEL_YN, mrp.PART_SN, mrp.PART_USER_ID, mrp.JOIN_DT, mrp.EXIT_DT, mrp.NOTI_YN, mrp.LST_READ_MSG_SN, d.dept_nm as part_dept_nm, j.jbgr_nm as part_jbgr_nm,
m.user_name as part_user_name FROM MESSAGE_ROOM mr INNER JOIN MESSAGE_ROOM_PARTICIPANT mrp ON mr.ROOM_SN = mrp.ROOM_SN INNER JOIN member m ON mrp.PART_USER_ID = m.user_id inner join EMPLOYEE_INFO ei on m.user_id = ei.user_id inner join DEPARTMENT d on ei.dept_cd = d.dept_cd inner join JOB_GRADE j on ei.jbgr_cd = j.jbgr_cd
mr.ROOM_SN = #{roomSn} AND mr.DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MESSAGE_CONTENT ( ROOM_SN, SENDR_USER_ID, MSG_TYPE_CD, MSG_CN, ATCH_FILE_ID ) VALUES ( #{roomSn}, #{sendrUserId}, COALESCE(#{msgTypeCd}, '01'), #{msgCn}, #{atchFileId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select:
SELECT mc.*, m.user_name as user_name, d.dept_nm as part_dept_nm, j.jbgr_nm as part_jbgr_nm,
cad.ORGN_FILE_NM as file_nm FROM MESSAGE_CONTENT mc left join member m on mc.sendr_user_id = m.user_id left join CMMT_ATCH_FILE_DTL cad on cad.ATCH_FILE_DTL_SN = TO_NUMBER(mc.ATCH_FILE_ID) inner join EMPLOYEE_INFO ei on m.user_id = ei.user_id inner join DEPARTMENT d on ei.dept_cd = d.dept_cd inner join JOB_GRADE j on ei.jbgr_cd = j.jbgr_cd
WHERE mc.ROOM_SN = #{roomSn} ORDER BY mc.MSG_SN desc offset #{paginationInfo.offset} rows fetch next #{paginationInfo.screenSize} rows only

SELECT m.user_name as user_name, d.dept_nm as part_dept_nm, j.jbgr_nm as part_jbgr_nm FROM member m inner join EMPLOYEE_INFO ei on m.user_id = ei.user_id inner join DEPARTMENT d on ei.dept_cd = d.dept_cd inner join JOB_GRADE j on ei.jbgr_cd = j.jbgr_cd WHERE m.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT mr.ROOM_SN
FROM MESSAGE_ROOM mr WHERE mr.ROOM_TYPE_CD = '01' AND mr.ROOM_SN IN ( SELECT ROOM_SN FROM MESSAGE_ROOM_PARTICIPANT WHERE PART_USER_ID = #{myId} ) AND mr.ROOM_SN IN ( SELECT ROOM_SN FROM MESSAGE_ROOM_PARTICIPANT WHERE PART_USER_ID = #{otherId} ) AND mr.DEL_YN = 'N'
